audit_findings.finding: XIA-CHAT-05: admin token accepted via URL query ?token= → leaks to CF edge logs / Referer / browser history / proxy logs
audit_findings.remediation: Delete `|| url.searchParams.get('token')` fallback; force X-Admin-Token header only

audit_findings.finding: XIA-CHAT-06: admin token compared with !== (non-constant-time) → timing side-channel leaks length/prefix
audit_findings.remediation: Introduce ctEq() constant-time comparison; replace !== at admin check

audit_findings.finding: XIA-CHAT-07: admin GET endpoint bypasses checkRateLimit → unlimited ADMIN_TOKEN brute-force attempts, compounds XIA-CHAT-06 timing leak
audit_findings.remediation: Call checkRateLimit(ip) at top of GET branch before auth check
